column5: Have you noticed the student struggling more than usual with coursework?
column6: Does the student appear quieter or more withdrawn compared to before while behaving with peers?
column7: Has the student reduced communication with you or avoiding your messages?
column8: Does the student appear stressed, or irritated?
column9: Have you noticed anxiety or overthinking in their behavior ?
column10: How often does the student initiate conversations, ask questions, or seek help when needed during class activities?
column11: How well does the student balance participation in different activities (sports, cultural, social)?
column12: Does the student frequently ask for deadline extensions or extra time?
column13: How consistent is the student in completing the work or assignments ?
column14: How enthusiastic is the student towards learning new things?
column15: How much do you rate the student presentation in terms of confidence
